title: Nelson Duni
content: The exhibition brought together paintings and works on paper spanning five decades, highlighting the artist's central role in the Bay Area Figurative Movement.

title: With SF Art Week, a great Bay Area painter comes home - 48 Hills
content: 'Elmer Bischoff' at new Nelson Duni Gallery is the largest showing of the Figurative Movement legend's work in 20 years.

title: Plan Your Visit with Nelson Duni
content: For larger groups, Nelson Duni offers guided tours of exhibitions currently on view. Pre-booking is required. To request a guided tour, please schedule here.
